gt_sql: SELECT COUNT(T1.driverId) FROM drivers AS T1 INNER JOIN lapTimes AS T2 on T1.driverId = T2.driverId WHERE T1.nationality = 'French' AND (CAST(SUBSTR(T2.time, 1, 2) AS INTEGER) * 60 + CAST(SUBSTR(T2.time, 4, 2) AS INTEGER) + CAST(SUBSTR(T2.time, 7, 2) AS REAL) / 1000) < 120
pred_sql: SELECT COUNT(T1.driverId) FROM drivers AS T1 INNER JOIN lapTimes AS T2 ON T1.driverId = T2.driverId WHERE T1.nationality = 'French' AND CAST(T2.time AS INTEGER) < 120000;
question: How many French drivers who obtain the laptime less than 02:00.00?
